primary_kpis: Revenue, margin, AOV, return rate, monthly trend, hero categories
why_this_report_exists: Gives the quickest health check of scale, profitability and trading momentum.
how_to_use_it: Use first in interviews and board-style walkthroughs.

audience: Executive team, BI Ops, Marketing, Merchandising
primary_kpis: Next-best actions, agents, anomalies, category roles, channel efficiency
why_this_report_exists: Shows the shift from passive reporting to intelligent operating rhythm.
how_to_use_it: Use to explain how AI agents can turn BI signals into actions.

primary_kpis: AUC, recall, risk bands, risky categories/products
why_this_report_exists: Demonstrates applied ML and shows where return leakage can be attacked.
how_to_use_it: Use to position model as a watchlist, not a perfect oracle.

primary_kpis: ROAS, A/B uplift, SEO roadmap, competitor comparison, campaign calendar
why_this_report_exists: Connects BI to revenue growth and Azure-credit discipline.
how_to_use_it: Use to justify scaling only after tests prove lift.

primary_kpis: VAT, refunds, journal entries, SAP mapping, exceptions
why_this_report_exists: Shows accounting-grade reconciliation, not just analytics storytelling.
how_to_use_it: Use to prove finance, SAP BW/SAP B1 and audit readiness.

audience: Data Architect, BI Lead, Hiring Manager
primary_kpis: Star schema, table grain, relationships, OneLake paths, pipeline proof
why_this_report_exists: Explains how the data model is built and why it can scale.
how_to_use_it: Use to demonstrate senior architecture thinking.

primary_kpis: Executive, ML and marketing proof screenshots
why_this_report_exists: Provides visual evidence even if the live tenant is not open.
how_to_use_it: Use as quick proof in applications, interviews and email follow-ups.

primary_kpis: Concise end-to-end story, screenshots, KPIs, handover and cost control
why_this_report_exists: A leave-behind that consolidates the whole project into one polished artifact.
how_to_use_it: Use as the main portfolio attachment.
